scripts.sync:cosmetics: node scripts/discover-cosmetics.js && node scripts/normalize-cosmetics.js && node scripts/sync-cosmetic-assets.js && node scripts/audit-cosmetics.js
scripts.sync:sources:health: node scripts/sync-community-content.js --health-check && node scripts/sync-map-layouts.js --health-check && node scripts/sync-descriptions.js --health-check
scripts.check:data: node scripts/normalize-images.js --check && node scripts/build-data.js --check && node scripts/audit-cosmetics.js && node scripts/verify-teachables.js && node scripts/verify-perk-descriptions.js && node scripts/verify-data-contracts.js
scripts.verify:content: node scripts/normalize-images.js --check && node scripts/audit-cosmetics.js && node scripts/verify-teachables.js && node scripts/verify-perk-descriptions.js && node scripts/verify-data-contracts.js
scripts.android:build: npm run sync && npm run android:prepare-release-assets && cd android && JAVA_HOME=${JAVA_HOME:-/opt/android-studio/jbr} ./gradlew assembleRelease
scripts.android:bundle:play: npm run build:data && npm run sync && npm run android:prepare-release-assets && cd android && JAVA_HOME=${JAVA_HOME:-/opt/android-studio/jbr} ./gradlew clean bundleRelease --rerun-tasks
